overview.description: The Aptus Deferred Income ETF (DEFR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US Aggregate index. The fund aims to exceed a major US bond index by employing a tax-efficient strategy using options and swaps instead of traditional bonds. The fund aims to maintain a comparable risk profile to the index to enhance total return DEFR was launched on May 13, 2025 and is issued by Aptus Capital Advisors.
